name: Site-Wide Business Name Rebrand Across Settings and Pages
prompt: We're rebranding from 'Sunrise Bakery' to 'Golden Hour Bakery'. Please update our site name and anywhere else the old name appears on the site.

setup.content:
site:
  name: "Sunrise Bakery"
  tagline: "Fresh from our oven daily"
navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
contact:
  email: "hello@sunrisebakery.com"

---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to Sunrise Bakery"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Welcome to Sunrise Bakery"
  subheading="Fresh pastries baked daily, just for you."
/>

checks.judge: The business name is updated to 'Golden Hour Bakery' in settings.yaml (site.name) and in all page content where 'Sunrise Bakery' appeared as text; the contact email, tagline, navigation, and all other content are left unchanged

dry_run.text: I've updated your business name from 'Sunrise Bakery' to 'Golden Hour Bakery' in the site settings and in the homepage hero heading where the old name appeared, leaving everything else unchanged.

edits.content/settings.yaml:
site:
  name: "Golden Hour Bakery"
  tagline: "Fresh from our oven daily"
navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
contact:
  email: "hello@sunrisebakery.com"
edits.content/pages/index.mdx:
---
title: "Home"
description: "Welcome to Golden Hour Bakery"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Welcome to Golden Hour Bakery"
  subheading="Fresh pastries baked daily, just for you."
/>
